title: draco fruticosa
intro: Draco fruticosa, also known as dragon's blood tree, is a succulent plant native to Madagascar and the Comoros Islands, known for its vibrant red sap. The medicinal properties of Draco fruticosa are attributed to its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Draco fruticosa include tinctures, capsules, and creams, often used to treat a variety of health conditions.
